name: Irati Forest: Mendilatz Loop Trail
name_original: Selva de Irati – rodeo al Mendilatz por el Col de Bentarte
description: This difficult 17.6-mile mountain biking route through the Irati Forest offers challenging climbs, stunning Pyrenean views, and historical s
tips:
The facilities are really interesting. The location is, to say the least, spectacular.
It is lucky to be able to cycle through these beautiful natural spaces full of well-preserved pieces of history.

Coinciding with the GR 12 route, this path runs through the Irati Forest, so you are guaranteed shade and a very picturesque landscape. In addition, when you arrive at Col de Bentarte you will be able to enjoy beautiful panoramic views of both the Spanish and French sides, since it is located right on the border.

Delimiting the Spain-France border, this pass is an ideal place to take a break and enjoy the wonderful landscape of the Selva de Irati. A few meters from here there is a water source and some small buildings that can serve as shelter if you need it.

faqs.question: Where does the trail start and where can I park?
faqs.answer: The initial section of the route typically starts near Azpegi. While specific parking details for this exact trailhead aren't provided, the wider Irati Forest area offers various parking options. It's advisable to check local signage upon arrival for designated parking areas.

faqs.question: Is this mountain biking trail suitable for beginners?
faqs.answer: No, this trail is rated as difficult and requires a good physical condition and an advanced level of experience. Riders should be prepared for significant elevation changes, strong ascents, and pronounced descents. Some segments may even require pushing your bike.

faqs.question: What kind of terrain can I expect on this route?
faqs.answer: You will encounter a varied terrain, including forest tracks and mountain trails. The route features physically demanding paths with considerable elevation changes. Expect a mix of dense forest masses and open, deforested pastures, sometimes dotted with shepherds' huts.

faqs.question: What are the main points of interest along the trail?
faqs.answer: Key highlights include the historic Orbaizeta Royal Arms Factory, the scenic Trail to Col de Bentarte, and the Collado de Bentartea. The route also offers stunning views of the Pyrenean mountains, especially from the Col de Bentarte, which marks part of the Spain-France border. You'll also pass through ancient Roman roads and may spot megalithic sites.

faqs.question: When is the best time of year to ride this trail?
faqs.answer: The Irati Forest is beautiful year-round, but the best times for mountain biking are typically spring and autumn. In spring, the forest is vibrant green, while autumn offers a spectacular display of reds, yellows, and oranges. Always check weather conditions before heading out, especially for mountain routes.

faqs.question: Is this mountain biking trail dog-friendly?
faqs.answer: While the Irati Forest generally welcomes dogs, specific regulations for mountain biking trails can vary. It's always best to keep your dog on a leash to protect wildlife and ensure the safety of other trail users. Please check local signage for any specific restrictions on this route.

faqs.question: Do I need a permit or is there an entrance fee for the Irati Forest?
faqs.answer: The Irati Forest is a protected natural area. While there isn't typically an entrance fee for general access to the forest, certain areas or activities might require permits or have specific regulations. For the most up-to-date information on permits or fees, it's recommended to consult the official website of the Irati Forest or local tourism offices, such as visitnavarra.es.

faqs.question: Does this trail intersect with other well-known paths?
faqs.answer: Yes, this route shares sections with several other trails. You'll find it intersects with parts of the Euskal Herriko ibilaldia, Txangoa - Roncesvalles, Étape 04, and the Ruta Transpirenaica en BTT (Aisa - Roncesvalles), among others. This offers opportunities to explore extended routes if you wish.

faqs.question: What kind of wildlife might I encounter?
faqs.answer: The Irati Forest is rich in biodiversity. While specific sightings are never guaranteed, you might spot various bird species, deer, wild boar, and even wild horses in the pastures. Remember to observe wildlife from a distance and avoid disturbing their natural habitat.

faqs.question: Is this a circular mountain biking route?
faqs.answer: Yes, the "Selva de Irati – rodeo al Mendilatz por el Col de Bentarte" is designed as a circular route, allowing you to return to your starting point without retracing your steps. This makes it convenient for a full-day adventure.

faqs.question: What should I bring for this difficult mountain biking trail?
faqs.answer: Given its difficulty, you should bring appropriate mountain biking gear, including a well-maintained bike, helmet, gloves, and protective eyewear. Essential items include plenty of water, high-energy snacks, a repair kit (spare tube, pump, multi-tool), a first-aid kit, and navigation tools (GPS device or a fully charged phone with the route downloaded). Layered clothing is also recommended due to potential weather changes in the mountains.
